name: Beanherders Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375F.
2. The Filling:
a. Cut up the garlic and onion. In a large Dutch oven, saute garlic and onion in the wine until soft.
b. Add the red pepper and corn and cook over medium heat until the corn is tender. Remove from pot and set aside.
c. In another splash of wine, saute the mushrooms until soft. Add the kidney beans, tomatoes, green beans, and spices, and simmer for 15 minutes over low heat.
d. Add the corn/pepper mixture back in for three more minutes.
3. The Topping:
a. Cut up and boil the potatoes for 15 minutes. Drain.
b. Add the milk, egg replacement, and nutmeg to the potatoes. Beat with a hand mixer until smooth.
4. Place the filling in a large casserole dish, and spread the mashed potatoes over top. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes. Let stand for 5-10 minutes, and serve.
